chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Criminal Acquittal Appeal No. 50 of 2020 (Syed Tehseen Ali Sabzwari v. Gul Khan and another) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Disposed of matter For orders on MA No.2132/23 26.04.2024 Mr. Afaq Ahmed, advocate for the appellant --------------------------------------- The facts, in brief, necessary for disposal of the listed application are that the private respondents were charged for having committed the offence punishable under Section 489-F, 420 and 506 PPC and he after due trial was acquitted by learned XV- Judicial Magistrate South; such acquittal was impugned by the appellant by preferring an acquittal appeal before this Court, same on account of his continuous absence together with his counsel was dismissed for non-prosecution by this Court vide order dated 19.01.2023; it is sought to be recalled by the appellant by way of listed application. The continuous absence on the part of the appellant and his counsel has not been explained plausibly to justify this Court to recall the subject order. The law favours the diligent and not the negligent. Consequently, the listed application is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE Nadir
